message:
feat(providers): parse cached token count from OpenAI streaming responses

OpenAI's chat completion API includes prompt_tokens_details with a
cached_tokens field in usage chunks, indicating how many prompt tokens
were served from the KV cache. This information was being silently
dropped.

- Add OpenAIPromptTokensDetails struct to deserialize the nested
  prompt_tokens_details object
- Add prompt_tokens_details field to OpenAIUsage with serde(default)
  for backwards compatibility with older API responses
- Populate usage.cache_read from cached_tokens when present, enabling
  accurate cache hit reporting in session telemetry

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
